description: 30 multi-step test prompts for the GSC MCP eval harness. Mirrors audit/04-eval-harness.md §1.

placeholders.{{PAGE_URL}}: Replaced at run time via --page-url (or inferred from a preceding tool call).

prompts.prompt: What's my active GSC account?
List the GSC properties I have access to that contain 'chaser'.
Show every property I can see.
prompts.notes: Post-A.6, the response should be capped at 50 with a nudge.

prompts.prompt: Switch to the 'chaser' account.
Run a health check on {{SITE_URL}}.
Give me a 28-day performance overview of {{SITE_URL}}.
Top 100 queries by clicks for {{SITE_URL}} last 28 days.
prompts.notes: Post-A.1 default is 100; this prompt tests that 100 is sufficient and no loud TRUNCATED warning fires if the site has <=100 unique queries.

prompts.prompt: Top 1000 queries for last 7 days, sorted by impressions descending.
prompts.notes: Agent must explicitly pass row_limit=1000 post-A.1.

prompts.prompt: Compare last 28 days vs the prior 28 days by query for {{SITE_URL}}.
Which of my landing pages are in striking distance of page 1 on {{SITE_URL}}?
Compare landing-page performance this quarter vs last quarter for {{SITE_URL}}.
Which queries drive the top-performing page on {{SITE_URL}}?
prompts.notes: Tests disambiguation — agent must pick the composed landing-page tool then drill into one page. Post-A.5 the description guidance should make this obvious.

prompts.prompt: Break down queries for {{PAGE_URL}} as JSON.
prompts.notes: Tests the JSON vs markdown overhead; post-B.5 the JSON default would flip.

prompts.prompt: Is {{PAGE_URL}} indexed?
Batch-check these 8 URLs for indexing issues: {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}.
Which of these URLs have indexing problems? {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}, {{PAGE_URL}}.
prompts.notes: Tests inspection-tool disambiguation — agent should pick gsc_check_indexing_issues over gsc_inspect_url_enhanced or gsc_batch_url_inspection.

prompts.prompt: List all sitemaps for {{SITE_URL}}.
prompts.notes: Pre-A.3 gsc_get_sitemaps was broken; agent would have to route to gsc_list_sitemaps_enhanced. Post-A.3 either tool works.

prompts.prompt: Show me details for sitemap https://example.com/sitemap.xml on {{SITE_URL}}.
Submit a new sitemap at https://example.com/new-sitemap.xml to {{SITE_URL}}.
Load my Screaming Frog export from {{SF_EXPORT_PATH}} for {{SITE_URL}}.
prompts.notes: Requires --sf-export CLI arg pointing at a real SF export.

prompts.prompt: Query the SF session for all URLs with status 200 ordered by inlinks.
prompts.notes: Must follow prompt 20 in the same session so session_id exists.

prompts.prompt: Find the 5 striking-distance pages on {{SITE_URL}}, then run a per-page query drilldown on each.
prompts.notes: Multi-step chained workflow — the ref doc's key requirement.

prompts.prompt: Show me striking-distance pages for UK desktop only on {{SITE_URL}}.
Compare the 'chaser login' query position this month vs last month on {{SITE_URL}}.
Drop the 'ephemeral-test' account.
My GSC quota is exceeded right now, check sitemaps on {{SITE_URL}} anyway.
prompts.notes: Error-recovery test — agent should proceed rather than refuse.

prompts.prompt: Inspect {{PAGE_URL}} on {{SITE_URL}}; I don't have permission for it.
Get all 2,500 queries from {{SITE_URL}}.
prompts.notes: Tests that the agent follows the pagination cursor nudge at least 3 times (at row_limit=1000, 2500 rows = 3 pages). Post-A.1 with default 100, this would be 25 pages — an excellent test of pagination-follow-through under the tightened default.

prompts.prompt: Scan every sitemap on {{SITE_URL}} for errors.
Compare last month vs this month for my top 50 landing pages on {{SITE_URL}}.
